name: apt
description: Package manager for Debian-based Linux distributions

name: -d
--download-only
options.description: For any operation that would download packages, download them, but do nothing else

options.name: --no-download
options.description: Do not download packages, attempt to use already downloaded packages

name: -s
--simulate
options.description: Simulate running this command and show it's output, without actually changing anything
